name: cellulose gum
description: A water-soluble polymer used to thicken, stabilize, and improve the texture of food products.
raw_text: King soopers city market, king soopers, chocolate cake: sugar, corn starch, partially hydrogenated vegtable oil (cotton seed and/or soybean), rice flour, soy lecithin, dextrin, confectioner's glaze, gum aribic, natural & artificial flavor, cellulose gum, carrageenan, carnauba wax, red 3. | Crunch Cake: ENRICHED WHEAT FLOUR BLEACHED (FLOUR BLEACHED (FLOUR, NIACIN, IRON THIAMINE MONONITRATE, RIBOFLAVIN, FOLIC ACID), SUGAR, EGGS, SOYBEAN OIL, WATER, MANGO, FOOD STARCH-MODIFIED (CORN), DEXTROSE, LEAVENING (SODIUM ALUMINUM PHOSPHATE, BAKING SODA, MONOCALCIUM
